caption: In a room with wooden paneled walls, a man wearing glasses and a white shirt with a dark vest stands at a podium, speaking into a microphone. He is facing an audience of people seated in rows of chairs. The audience members are viewed from behind, including a man in a plaid shirt and several women wearing colorful attire, such as a blue and red patterned garment and a yellow shirt. A woman with short white hair is also seated among them. A black speaker is mounted on the wall to the left. In the lower right of the scene, a white box containing the text "ORCA" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the man at the podium continues to speak and gesture slightly, while the audience remains seated and attentive. The overall scene remains static with only minor movements from the speaker.
